sections.paragraph:
κατεπιθυμέω (s. ἐπιθυμέω; otherw. found IV/V a.d.) be very eager κατεπιθυμεῖς καθίσαι ἐκ δεξιῶν μετʼ αὐτῶν Hv 3, 2, 2.

otherw. otherw. = otherwise

Hv Hv = Visions

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 531
